overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player walking through a rainy swamp forest along a riverbank. The player moves past fallen logs and rock formations while foraging for plants.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy riverbank beside the water

entered.detail: large decaying log partially submerged in the river water
murky swamp water flowing alongside the path
dense tall trees forming a thick canopy overhead
tall green grass and vegetation covering the riverbank

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rainy riverbank with a large fallen log visible in the murky water. Tall grass and dense forest canopy line both sides of the path as light rain falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with forageable plants

events.description: game UI prompt appears offering to pick and examine a plant

agents.ego_description: approaching a forageable plant near the rocky shoreline

entered.detail: cluster of large gray boulders lining the right side of the path
small green plant with game interaction prompt

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrower section of the riverbank with large boulders on the right and the river on the left. The player approaches a forageable plant triggering a game interaction prompt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp river with rocky shore

events.description: UI prompt identifies the plant as Common Bulrush

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rocky riverbank past the forageable plant

entered.detail: wider view of the swamp river opening up ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the swamp riverbank with a more open view of the water ahead. The large rock formations recede into the mid-distance as the player moves past the forageable plant identified as Common Bulrush.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rainy riverbank that transitions from a dense forest canopy to a more open swamp landscape. It begins by moving past a large fallen log resting in murky water, with tall grass and thick trees framing the path under a light rain. As the camera advances, the path narrows, pressing between the flowing river on the left and a series of large boulders on the right. The scene then shifts toward a forageable plant, triggering an interaction prompt as the camera pauses briefly over a Common Bulrush. Finally, the view expands across the water as the rock formations recede into the distance, leaving the riverbank open and clear.
